name: Turtle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and butter. Blend well.
2. Press mixture into the bottom and 2 inches up the sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes or until set. Cool.
4. In a saucepan over low heat, melt caramels in milk, stirring until smooth. Let cool for 5 minutes.
5. Pour into crust.
6. Top with 1 1/2 cups of pecans.
7. In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth. Add sugar and vanilla. Mix well.
8. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
9. Add chocolate. Mix just until blended.
10. Carefully spread over pecans.
11. Bake at 350°F for 55-65 minutes or until filling is almost set. Cool to room temperature.
12. Chill overnight. Garnish with remaining pecans and whipped cream, if desired.
